name: Tales Beyond The Tomb - The Farm's Secret
short_description: Dragged into a web of secrets and lies, Samantha seems to be part of a puzzle impossible to solve. What once seemed obvious soon turns into something far more sinister, and the line between villain and victim begins to blur.
detailed_description:
"Tales Beyond The Tomb" is a chilling episodic horror series that plunges players into the shadows of real-life cases.

Inspired by the atmospheric horror of the 80s and 90s, each episode simulates the frightening experiences of real people, mixing nostalgia with relentless suspense.

This is the second episode of the series:

Episode 2: The Farm's Secret

Dragged into a web of secrets and lies, Samantha seems to be part of a puzzle impossible to solve. What once seemed obvious soon turns into something far more sinister, and the line between villain and victim begins to blur.

Nothing is as it seems. How far will you go to uncover the truth?

Main Features

  • VHS Aesthetic – Step back in time with visuals inspired by classic horror films from the 80s and 90s.

  • Photorealistic graphics and immersive environments - Feel the dread with realistic visuals and frightening scenarios.

  • Player voice activity - Interaction system with your microphone (no microphone is required to play, but this will increase your immersion and bring a complete experience).

  • Dialogue Text System – Immerse yourself in the plot with dynamic, narrative dialogue.

  • Drive car - Car driving system completely based on real physics.

Gameplay

A first-person exploration experience (walking simulator), where realism is key. Navigate immersive locations, discover disturbing truths, and face your fears.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America
